summary: Canonical capability parity map for Hermes-style Buddy operation across iPhone app, linked accounts, linked runtime, and web/admin surfaces.

groups.title: Companion
groups.description: Day planning, follow-through, teaching, memory shaping, and Buddy care/training.

groups.title: Workspace
groups.description: Reading, writing, supervising, and exporting workspace artifacts.

groups.title: Repo
groups.description: GitHub/private repo access and git mutation through approved routes.

groups.title: Skills
groups.description: Skill authoring, validation, install, equip, run, and supervision.

groups.title: Studio
groups.description: Pixel Studio, animation planning, Builder Studio, and user-creation surfaces.

groups.title: Admin
groups.description: Mission Control, builder/admin tools, profile management, and operator settings.

groups.title: Runtime
groups.description: Terminal/process execution, safe command routing, runtime resume, and deep operator actions.

trustBoundaries.title: Native app
trustBoundaries.description: Runs completely inside the iPhone BeMore app without external runtime requirements.

trustBoundaries.title: Linked account
trustBoundaries.description: Requires a user-linked external account such as GitHub or ChatGPT/OpenAI.

trustBoundaries.title: Linked runtime
trustBoundaries.description: Requires a paired BeMore/Hermes runtime such as the Mac/runtime layer.

trustBoundaries.title: Web shell
trustBoundaries.description: Available through website/admin surfaces hosted in prismtek-site.

capabilities.title: Buddy Chat
capabilities.notes: Core Buddy conversation and everyday help.

capabilities.title: Buddy Training
capabilities.notes: Tamagotchi-style care, growth, memory shaping, and training loops.

capabilities.title: Buddy Memory
capabilities.notes: Facts, preferences, session state, and durable memory artifacts.

capabilities.title: Workspace Read
capabilities.notes: Read app-owned BeMore workspace files and runtime-owned artifacts.

capabilities.title: Workspace Write
capabilities.notes: Persist workspace edits and Buddy-created artifacts with receipts.

capabilities.title: Artifact Supervision
capabilities.notes: Preview, inspect, and export generated artifacts.

capabilities.title: Web Research
capabilities.notes: Web browsing and documentation lookup.

capabilities.title: GitHub Public Read
capabilities.notes: Search public repositories, issues, and code metadata.

capabilities.title: GitHub Private Read
capabilities.notes: Requires linked GitHub account or approved runtime credentials.

capabilities.title: Git Mutate
capabilities.notes: Requires paired runtime for real repo mutation and patch application.

capabilities.title: Skill Authoring
capabilities.notes: Teach, review, refine, validate, and approve reusable Buddy skills.

capabilities.title: Skill Run
capabilities.notes: Run approved manifest-backed skills and persist their outputs.

capabilities.title: Pokemon Team Builder
capabilities.notes: Flagship real skill backed by receipts and saved artifacts.

capabilities.title: Pixel Studio
capabilities.notes: Pixel project brief, Buddy finish/improve/animate artifacts, and web Pixel Studio surface.

capabilities.title: Pixel Animation Assist
capabilities.notes: Buddy animation plans and finish passes for pixel projects.

capabilities.title: Builder Studio
capabilities.notes: Website builder/admin tool surfaced inside the app shell.

capabilities.title: Admin Mission Control
capabilities.notes: Website admin Mission Control surfaced inside the app shell.

capabilities.title: Profile Management
capabilities.notes: User-created profiles and account surfaces.

capabilities.title: Safe Runtime Exec
capabilities.notes: Controlled command execution routed through paired runtime.

capabilities.title: Full Runtime Exec
capabilities.notes: Deep operator execution only through paired runtime, never hidden in the app.

capabilities.title: Runtime Resume
capabilities.notes: Resume sessions, task/results, and open approvals from paired runtime.

capabilities.title: ChatGPT/OpenAI Account Link
capabilities.notes: Requires a real OAuth client flow; contract present even if the app has not shipped it yet.
